TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alan khaw na 'tayal aring sraral mutuw pmhyun Tayal ka mutuw naha' galan khaw hya' ga, mluw squ qqyanux naha' mmuhi' sa ruma' tayal sa ggalan naha' ttngasal han, babaw nya' mwah qu Gipun lga, sgsugun na Gipun maha qiri' mmuhi' sa labing ru blhuy, ru galun na Gipun sbaziy naha' tay Gipun maha ruw, aring kya qu lawkah muhi' kya kwara' qu qalang na Tayal qani. suruw na Gipun lga, yaqu nuka' na kgiy squ bblhuy qu spyang bzirun na Plmukan galan khaw na Tayal hya' ha, yalaw gi wayal t'rgun tmutu' na Plmukan kwara' qqhuniq rgyax tayal lru, ki'a naha' skngungu' ppsluhiy kwara' rhzyal rgrgyax lru, sgin na aki' ta' pkmtasiq kwara' rhzyal Taywan maha lru, aring 45 kawas thayluw lqu sglaing naha' mmuhi' qayparung Gipun la, nanu' ktan kya na Tayal lruw, yasa siy ppmuhi' qayparung kwara' qu Tayal kya la. kwara' qani hya' ga kahul sa bbzirun na Plmukan qu spmuhi' naha' qani hya'. tayhuk 60 kawas thayluw lga, wal si 'nxal yaqih kwara' qu bbziran khkhaw tayal ka rruma' ru qayparung ru kwara' ka bblhuy ru nuka' uzi lruw, minusa' sayqabu' hugal kwara' qu mmrkyas tayal kruma', ga musa' muhi' tqinuw rgyax kruma' qu tayal hya' ha, ga ini' tayhuk mawpuw kawas lga, mngaygyut mwah mmuhi' baybway qhuniq ka nasi', qzimux, ru bnubuw qani lga, ini' qbsyaq uzi, ruw iyugun naha' sa qapu' Gipun la, babaw niya' lga, pzyux iyal qu muhi' sa baybway lru, mkura' sa muhi' rramat qu maki' tay rgyax la, ruw nanu' ya'qani qu nyuw naha' lhingan mlahang na' misuw qani la.
S.PHON: alan kńßaw na Ētajal ariŇč s~…ēraral mutuw pmńßjun tajal ka mutuw nańßa Ē …£alan kńßaw ńßja Ē …£a, mluw s~…ēqu qqjanux nańßa Ē mmuńßi Ē s~…ēa ruma Ē tajal s~…ēa …£…£alan nańßa Ē ttŇčas~…ēal ńßan, ő≤aő≤aw nja Ē mwańß qu …£ipun l…£a, s~…ē…£s~…ēu…£un na …£ipun mańßa qiri Ē mmuńßi Ē s~…ēa laő≤iŇč ru ő≤lńßuj, ru …£alun na …£ipun s~…ēő≤azij nańßa Ē taj …£ipun mańßa ruw, ariŇč kja qu lawkańß muńßi Ē kja kwara Ē qu qalaŇč na tajal qani. s~…ēuruw na …£ipun l…£a, jaqu nuka Ē na k…£ij s~…ēqu ő≤ő≤lńßuj qu s~…ēpjaŇč ő≤zirun na plmukan …£alan kńßaw na tajal ńßja Ē ńßa, jalaw …£i wajal t Ēr…£un tmutu Ē na plmukan kwara Ē qqńßuniq r…£jax tajal lru, ki Ēa nańßa Ē s~…ēkŇčuŇču Ē pps~…ēluńßij kwara Ē rńßzjal r…£r…£jax lru, s~…ē…£in na aki Ē ta Ē pkmtas~…ēiq kwara Ē rńßzjal tajwan mańßa lru, ariŇč ** kawas~…ē tńßajluw lqu s~…ē…£laiŇč nańßa Ē mmuńßi Ē qajparuŇč …£ipun la, nanu Ē ktan kja na tajal lruw, jas~…ēa s~…ēij ppmuńßi Ē qajparuŇč kwara Ē qu tajal kja la. kwara Ē qani ńßja Ē …£a kańßul s~…ēa ő≤ő≤zirun na plmukan qu s~…ēpmuńßi Ē nańßa Ē qani ńßja Ē. tajńßuk ** kawas~…ē tńßajluw l…£a, wal s~…ēi Ēnxal jaqińß kwara Ē qu ő≤ő≤ziran kńßkńßaw tajal ka rruma Ē ru qajparuŇč ru kwara Ē ka ő≤ő≤lńßuj ru nuka Ē uzi lruw, minus~…ēa Ē s~…ēajqaő≤u Ē ńßu…£al kwara Ē qu mmrkjas~…ē tajal kruma Ē, …£a mus~…ēa Ē muńßi Ē tqinuw r…£jax kruma Ē qu tajal ńßja Ē ńßa, …£a ini Ē tajńßuk mawpuw kawas~…ē l…£a, mŇčaj…£jut mwańß mmuńßi Ē ő≤ajő≤waj qńßuniq ka nas~…ēi Ē, qzimux, ru ő≤nuő≤uw qani l…£a, ini Ē qő≤s~…ējaq uzi, ruw iju…£un nańßa Ē s~…ēa qapu Ē …£ipun la, ő≤aő≤aw nija Ē l…£a, pzjux ijal qu muńßi Ē s~…ēa ő≤ajő≤waj lru, mkura Ē s~…ēa muńßi Ē rramat qu maki Ē taj r…£jax la, ruw nanu Ē ja Ēqani qu njuw nańßa Ē lńßiŇčan mlańßaŇč na Ē mis~…ēuw qani la.
S.FORM: alan khaw na 'tayal aring sraral mutuw pmhyun Tayal ka mutuw naha' galan khaw hya' ga, mluw squ qqyanux naha' mmuhi' sa ruma' tayal sa ggalan naha' ttngasal han, babaw nya' mwah qu Gipun lga, sgsugun na Gipun maha qiri' mmuhi' sa labing ru blhuy, ru galun na Gipun sbaziy naha' tay Gipun maha ruw, aring kya qu lawkah muhi' kya kwara' qu qalang na Tayal qani. suruw na Gipun lga, yaqu nuka' na kgiy squ bblhuy qu spyang bzirun na Plmukan galan khaw na Tayal hya' ha, yalaw gi wayal t'rgun tmutu' na Plmukan kwara' qqhuniq rgyax tayal lru, ki'a naha' skngungu' ppsluhiy kwara' rhzyal rgrgyax lru, sgin na aki' ta' pkmtasiq kwara' rhzyal Taywan maha lru, aring 45 kawas thayluw lqu sglaing naha' mmuhi' qayparung Gipun la, nanu' ktan kya na Tayal lruw, yasa siy ppmuhi' qayparung kwara' qu Tayal kya la. kwara' qani hya' ga kahul sa bbzirun na Plmukan qu spmuhi' naha' qani hya'. tayhuk 60 kawas thayluw lga, wal si 'nxal yaqih kwara' qu bbziran khkhaw tayal ka rruma' ru qayparung ru kwara' ka bblhuy ru nuka' uzi lruw, minusa' sayqabu' hugal kwara' qu mmrkyas tayal kruma', ga musa' muhi' tqinuw rgyax kruma' qu tayal hya' ha, ga ini' tayhuk mawpuw kawas lga, mngaygyut mwah mmuhi' baybway qhuniq ka nasi', qzimux, ru bnubuw qani lga, ini' qbsyaq uzi, ruw iyugun naha' sa qapu' Gipun la, babaw niya' lga, pzyux iyal qu muhi' sa baybway lru, mkura' sa muhi' rramat qu maki' tay rgyax la, ruw nanu' ya'qani qu nyuw naha' lhingan mlahang na' misuw qani la.
S.PHON: alan kńßaw na Ētajal ariŇč s~…ēraral mutuw pmńßjun tajal ka mutuw nańßa Ē …£alan kńßaw ńßja Ē …£a, mluw s~…ēqu qqjanux nańßa Ē mmuńßi Ē s~…ēa ruma Ē tajal s~…ēa …£…£alan nańßa Ē ttŇčas~…ēal ńßan, ő≤aő≤aw nja Ē mwańß qu …£ipun l…£a, s~…ē…£s~…ēu…£un na …£ipun mańßa qiri Ē mmuńßi Ē s~…ēa laő≤iŇč ru ő≤lńßuj, ru …£alun na …£ipun s~…ēő≤azij nańßa Ē taj …£ipun mańßa ruw, ariŇč kja qu lawkańß muńßi Ē kja kwara Ē qu qalaŇč na tajal qani. s~…ēuruw na …£ipun l…£a, jaqu nuka Ē na k…£ij s~…ēqu ő≤ő≤lńßuj qu s~…ēpjaŇč ő≤zirun na plmukan …£alan kńßaw na tajal ńßja Ē ńßa, jalaw …£i wajal t Ēr…£un tmutu Ē na plmukan kwara Ē qqńßuniq r…£jax tajal lru, ki Ēa nańßa Ē s~…ēkŇčuŇču Ē pps~…ēluńßij kwara Ē rńßzjal r…£r…£jax lru, s~…ē…£in na aki Ē ta Ē pkmtas~…ēiq kwara Ē rńßzjal tajwan mańßa lru, ariŇč ** kawas~…ē tńßajluw lqu s~…ē…£laiŇč nańßa Ē mmuńßi Ē qajparuŇč …£ipun la, nanu Ē ktan kja na tajal lruw, jas~…ēa s~…ēij ppmuńßi Ē qajparuŇč kwara Ē qu tajal kja la. kwara Ē qani ńßja Ē …£a kańßul s~…ēa ő≤ő≤zirun na plmukan qu s~…ēpmuńßi Ē nańßa Ē qani ńßja Ē. tajńßuk ** kawas~…ē tńßajluw l…£a, wal s~…ēi Ēnxal jaqińß kwara Ē qu ő≤ő≤ziran kńßkńßaw tajal ka rruma Ē ru qajparuŇč ru kwara Ē ka ő≤ő≤lńßuj ru nuka Ē uzi lruw, minus~…ēa Ē s~…ēajqaő≤u Ē ńßu…£al kwara Ē qu mmrkjas~…ē tajal kruma Ē, …£a mus~…ēa Ē muńßi Ē tqinuw r…£jax kruma Ē qu tajal ńßja Ē ńßa, …£a ini Ē tajńßuk mawpuw kawas~…ē l…£a, mŇčaj…£jut mwańß mmuńßi Ē ő≤ajő≤waj qńßuniq ka nas~…ēi Ē, qzimux, ru ő≤nuő≤uw qani l…£a, ini Ē qő≤s~…ējaq uzi, ruw iju…£un nańßa Ē s~…ēa qapu Ē …£ipun la, ő≤aő≤aw nija Ē l…£a, pzjux ijal qu muńßi Ē s~…ēa ő≤ajő≤waj lru, mkura Ē s~…ēa muńßi Ē rramat qu maki Ē taj r…£jax la, ruw nanu Ē ja Ēqani qu njuw nańßa Ē lńßiŇčan mlańßaŇč na Ē mis~…ēuw qani la.
